name: openclaw-dash
description: A local macOS dashboard for monitoring and controlling OpenClaw Gateway.

scripts.build:assets: npm run build:css && npm run build:vendor
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check scripts/smoke-test.js && node --check scripts/prepare-assets.js && node --check src/server/*.js && node --check src/server/routes/*.js && node --check tests/endpoint-mock.test.js
scripts.lint: semistandard server.js scripts/*.js src/server/*.js src/server/routes/*.js tests/*.js tailwind.config.js
scripts.test: npm run build:assets && node scripts/smoke-test.js && node tests/endpoint-mock.test.js

author: Micar2024
